name: Oxygen Cylinder with Trolley Set — 6 Litre
shortDescription: 6-litre medical oxygen cylinder with regulator, humidifier bottle and wheeled trolley.
longDescription: A 6-litre oxygen cylinder fitted with a regulator and humidifier bottle, mounted on a wheeled trolley for quick movement to a casualty on site. Kept at a first-aid or medical room station as part of a facility's emergency response equipment.

images.alt: Oxygen Cylinder with Trolley Set — 6 Litre supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
